title: The Physics of Overthinking: Living Inside Your Head and the Cost of Inaction
excerpt: An honest observation on how an overactive mind creates a loop of inaction, and why breaking the cycle requires moving out of your head and into reality.

title: Building a Portfolio with React and Three.js
excerpt: How I built an interactive 3D portfolio website using React, Three.js, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS — and the lessons I learned along the way.

title: Why TypeScript is Worth the Learning Curve
excerpt: TypeScript adds complexity, but the payoff in type safety, developer experience, and long-term maintainability makes it indispensable for serious projects.
